sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102179" key="taqri/sion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταθρίσιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταγμᾰ´τ-ιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of fish, <sense id="n102179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2143</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
